text.title: mocking-strategies Output Contract
text.summary: Schema for a per-collaborator double choice record.

section.title: JSON Schema

example.note: 3 violations: mock used where stub suffices (r1), isAsync=false on an async fn (r3), rationale too short.

list.item: Every collaborator has its own record.
doubleType is the smallest viable choice (no mock when stub works).
isAsync matches the function signature; AsyncMock used in setup when true.
patchTarget names the consumer module path, not the definition module.
rationale states what's being validated (not just "mock").
